inputs.label: Electricity Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Total electricity used in kWh per period (e.g., monthly or annual).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total electricity used in kWh per period (e.g., monthly or annual).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem başına (örneğin aylık veya yıllık) kullanılan toplam elektrik (kWh).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter Stromverbrauch in kWh pro Periode (z. B. monatlich oder jährlich).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Électricité totale utilisée en kWh par période (ex. mensuelle ou annuelle).
businessContext_i18n.es: Electricidad total utilizada en kWh por período (ej. mensual o anual).

inputs.label: Emission Factor (Electricity)
inputs.businessContext: CO2 equivalent per kWh, depends on grid mix. Default: EU average.

businessContext_i18n.en: CO2 equivalent per kWh, depends on grid mix. Default: EU average.
businessContext_i18n.tr: kWh başına CO2 eşdeğeri, şebeke karışımına bağlıdır. Varsayılan: AB ortalaması.
businessContext_i18n.de: CO₂-Äquivalent pro kWh, abhängig vom Strommix. Standard: EU-Durchschnitt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Équivalent CO2 par kWh, dépend du mix électrique. Par défaut : moyenne UE.
businessContext_i18n.es: CO2 equivalente por kWh, depende de la mezcla de la red. Valor predeterminado: promedio UE.

inputs.label: Emission Factor (Natural Gas)
inputs.businessContext: CO2 equivalent per m³ of natural gas.

businessContext_i18n.en: CO2 equivalent per m³ of natural gas.
businessContext_i18n.tr: m³ doğal gaz başına CO2 eşdeğeri.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Équivalent CO2 par m³ de gaz naturel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Equivalente de CO2 por m³ de gas natural.

inputs.label: Fuel Oil Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Volume of fuel oil (e.g., diesel) combusted.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of fuel oil (e.g., diesel) combusted.
businessContext_i18n.de: Menge des verbrannten Heizöls (z. B. Diesel).

inputs.label: Emission Factor (Fuel Oil)
inputs.businessContext: CO2 equivalent per litre of fuel oil.

businessContext_i18n.en: CO2 equivalent per litre of fuel oil.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Équivalent CO2 par litre de fioul.
businessContext_i18n.es: Equivalente de CO2 por litro de fuelóleo.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
